query:
-- Check order 990001 details
SELECT 
  id, shortId, customerName, quantity, totalAmountCents, status, 
  transportDates, purchaseType, createdAt
FROM orders
WHERE shortId = 'BF-FLS5SU' OR id = 990001
LIMIT 1;

-- Check passengers for this order
SELECT 
  id, orderId, name, cpf, boardingPointId, createdAt
FROM passengers
WHERE orderId IN (
  SELECT id FROM orders WHERE shortId = 'BF-FLS5SU' OR id = 990001
);

-- Check all multi-date orders (quantity > 1 or purchaseType = 'multiple'/'all_days')
SELECT 
  id, shortId, customerName, quantity, purchaseType, totalAmountCents, 
  transportDates, status, createdAt
FROM orders
WHERE quantity > 1 OR purchaseType IN ('multiple', 'all_days')
LIMIT 20;
